title: Bill 32 Regulations Continue Attack on Unions in Alberta
author: Jason Foster, Bob Barnetson
notes: Tier 3 academic analysis by Athabasca University researchers. Documents Dec 2021 regulations implementing Bill 32 opt-in provisions (effective Aug 1 2022). Key finding: designed to drain union political funding (mirrors US right-to-work laws). Regulations require unions to list all parties paid for non-core activities. Supplementary context for EVT-053.
